name: Lija Rally Skort
description: The Lija Rally Skort combines style and function with a flattering A-line silhouette and built-in compression shorts with a ball pocket. The UPF 50+ fabric provides sun protection during outdoor play, while the four-way stretch material moves with you through every shot.
care_instructions: Machine wash cold, gentle cycle. Do not bleach. Lay flat to dry to maintain shape and UPF protection. Do not iron.
